item.title: Create Your Island — CAI ◌ NotCents Interface
item.description: Join LB and stake a permanent coordinate in HexIsle's Ghost World / Real World tensor. MAKE your own island. Conducted Intelligence routes your design intent into lore, mechanics, and a Real-World Twinning anchor.
